aliases.comment: Representation of a simple user. Used with `createUser` method

values.name: allUsers
values.comment:
Show All Users

Usage: `allUsers accountId token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people?access_token={token}`

You may also use the user’s email address in place of a User ID

Response: `200 OK` if successful
values.type: String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List User)

values.name: assignUserToAProject
values.comment:
Assign A User To A Project

Usage: `assignUserToAProject accountId userId projectId token`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{projectId}/user_assignments?access_token={token}`

Response: `201 Created` and the header `Location: /projects/{PROJECT_ID}/user_assignments/{NEW_USER_ASSIGNMENT_ID}`
values.type: String -> Int -> Int -> String -> Request String

values.name: assignmentDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON assignment into a `Assignment`.

values.name: assignmentsDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of assignments into a `List Assignment`.

values.name: createUser
values.comment:
Create A New User

Usage:
`createUser accountId token user`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people?access_token={token}`

Response: `201 Created` if successful

values.name: deleteUser
values.comment:
Delete A User

Usage: `deleteUser accountId userId token`

sends a DELETE request to `https://YOURACCOUNT.harvestapp.com/people/{USERID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

values.name: getUser
values.comment:
Show single user

Usage:
`getUser accountId userId token`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people/{userId}?access_token={token}`

values.name: getUserAssignment
values.comment:
Get A User Assignment

Usage: `getUserAssignment accountId projectId assignmentId token`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{projectId}/user_assignments/{assignmentId}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful
values.type: String -> Int -> Int -> String -> Request Assignment

values.name: getUsersAssignedToProject
values.comment:
Get Users Assigned To Projects

Usage: `getUsersAssignedToProject accountId projectId token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{projectId}/user_assignments?access_token={token}`

Allowed parameters:

`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2015-09-25+18%3A30`
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List Assignment)

values.name: removeUserFromProject
values.comment:
Remove A User From A Project

Usage: `removeUserFromProject accountId projectId assignmentId token`

sends a DELETE request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{projectId}/user_assignments/{assignmentId}?access_token={token}`
values.type: String -> Int -> Int -> String -> Request String

values.name: toggleUser
values.comment:
Toggle An Existing User

Usage: `toggleUser accountId userId token`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people/{userId}/toggle?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

values.name: updateAssignment
values.comment:
Updating User Assignments

Usage: `updateAssignment accountId assignment token`

sends a PUT request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/user_assignments/{USER_ASSIGNMENT_ID}?access_token={token}`

values.name: updateUser
values.comment:
Update A User

Usage:
`updateUser accountId user token`

sends a PUT request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people/{USERID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

values.comment: Decode a JSON user into a `User`.

values.name: usersDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of users into a `List User`.

Deleting An Entry

values.name: getEntriesForCurrentDay
values.comment:
Retrieve Entries For The Current Day. Only tracked time, no assignments

Usage:
`getEntriesForCurrentDay accountId token`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/daily?slim=1&access_token={token}`

values.name: getEntriesForDayOfYear
values.comment:
Retrieve Entries For A Specific Date

Usage:
`getEntriesForDayOfYear accountId day year token userId`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/daily/{day}/{year}?access_token={token}`

Allowed parameters:

`of_user` e.g. `of_user=123456`

values.name: getEntryById

Retrieving A Single Entry

Toggling A Timer

`toggleEntry accountId entryId token`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

values.name: assignTaskToAProject
values.comment:
Assign Task To A Project

Usage:
`assignTaskToAProject accountId taskId projectId token`

Retruns `Location: /projects/{PROJECT_ID}/task_assignments/{NEW_TASK_ASSIGNMENT_ID}`
values.type: String -> Int -> Int -> String -> Request String

Create A New Task And Assign It To A Project

Returns `Location: /projects/{PROJECT_ID}/task_assignments/{NEW_TASK_ASSIGNMENT_ID}`
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> String -> Request String

values.name: createTask
values.comment:
Create New Task

Usage:
`createTask accountId token task`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/tasks?access_token={token}`

A successful call will return: `201 Created` and the header `Location: /tasks/{new_task_id}`

name: Harvest.ReportingAPI

aliases.name: DayEntry
aliases.comment:
Representation of a day entry.

Same object used for both

GET https://YOURACCOUNT.harvestapp.com/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/entries?from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD

and

GET https://YOURACCOUNT.harvestapp.com/people/{USER_ID}/entries?from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD

Later one doesn't have hours_with_timer field so we set it to 0
aliases.type: { id : Int, userId : Int, projectId : Int, taskId : Int, notes : Maybe String, spentAt : Date, hours : Float, adjustmentRecord : Bool, timerStartedAt : Maybe String, isClosed : Bool, isBilled : Bool, hoursWithTimer : Float, createdAt : Date, updatedAt : Date }

aliases.name: Expense
aliases.type: { id : Int, userId : Int, projectId : Int, invoiceId : Int, companyId : Int, totalCost : Float, units : Float, expenseCategoryId : Int, spentAt : Date, isClosed : Bool, notes : Maybe String, billable : Bool, hasReceipt : Bool, receiptUrl : Maybe String, isLocked : Bool, locked_reason : Maybe String, createdAt : Date, updatedAt : Date }

values.name: dayEntry
values.comment: Decode a JSON day entry into a `DayEntry`.

values.name: expense
values.comment: Decode a JSON expense into a `Expense`.

values.name: expenses
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of expenses into a `List Expense`.

values.name: getEntriesByUserForDateRange
values.comment:
All Entries For Project Timeframe

Usage:
`getEntriesByUserForDateRange accountId userId from to token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people/{userId}/entries?from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD&access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK if successful`
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List DayEntry)

values.name: getEntriesForProjectTimeframe
values.comment:
All Entries By User For Timeframe

This call requires parameters (from, to) to describe the timeframe to use for a report. This method can be used to view your own entries on a specific project.

Usage:
`getEntriesForProjectTimeframe accountId projectId from to token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{projectId}/entries?from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD&access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

Allowed parameters:

`billable` e.g. `billable=yes` (or `no`)
`only_billed`  e.g. `only_billed=yes`
`only_unbilled` e.g. `only_unbilled=yes`
`is_closed` e.g. `is_closed=yes` (or `no`)
`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2010-09-25+18%3A30`
`user_id` e.g. `user_id=1334`
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List DayEntry)

values.name: getExpensesByUserForDateRange
values.comment:
Show expenses for a given user and a time frame

Usage:
`getExpensesByUserForDateRange accountId userId from to token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/people/{userId}/expenses?from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD&access_token={token}`

Allowed parameters:

`is_closed` e.g. `is_closed=yes` (or `no`)
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List Expense)

values.name: getExpensesForProjectTimeframe
values.comment:
Show expenses for a project and a time frame

Usage:
`getExpensesForProjectTimeframe accountId projectId from to token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/projects/{projectId}/expenses?from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD&access_token={token}`

Allowed parameters:

`is_closed` e.g. `is_closed=yes` (or `no`)
`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2015-09-25+18%3A30`
`only_billed` e.g. `only_billed=yes`
`only_unbilled` e.g. `only_unbilled=yes`
`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2010-09-25+18%3A30`
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List Expense)

values.name: hours
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of day entries into a `List DayEntry`.

Create An Invoice

Create New Category

`createInvoiceCategory accountId token invoiceCategory`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoice_item_categories?access_token={token}`

values.name: createPayment
values.comment:
Create A New Payment

Usage:
`createPayment accountId token payment`

sends a POST request to `https://{accontIt}.harvestapp.com/invoices/{INVOICEID}/payments?acces_token={token}`

The fields `paid-at` and `amount` are required, and optionally `notes` can be included.

values.name: deleteInvoice

Delete Existing Invoice

Usage:
`deleteInvoice accountId invoiceId token`

sends a DELETE request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoices/{invoiceId}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

Delete A Category

Usage:
`deleteInvoiceCategory accountId invoiceCategoryId token`

`deleteMessage accountId invoiceId messageId token`

values.type: String -> Int -> Int -> String -> Request String

Delete Existing Payment

values.type: String -> Int -> Int -> String -> Request String

values.name: getAllInvoices
values.comment:
Show Recently Created Invoices

Usage: `getAllInvoices accountId token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoices?access_token={token}

Response: `200 OK` if successful

Allowed parameters:
`page` e.g. `page=2` (first page starts with 1)
`from/to` e.g. `from=YYYYMMDD&to=YYYYMMDD`
`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2010-09-25+18%3A30`
`status` e.g. `status=partial` (possible invoice states are [open, partial, draft, paid, unpaid, pastdue])
`client` e.g. `client=23445`
values.type: String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List Invoice)

values.comment:
Re-open An Invoice

Usage:
`markInvoiceAsOpen accountId invoiceId token`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoices/{invoiceId}/messages/re_open?access_token={token}`

values.name: markInvoiceAsSent
values.comment:
Mark An Invoice As Sent

Usage:
`markInvoiceAsSent accountId invoiceId token`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoices/{invoiceId}/messages/mark_as_sent?access_token={token}`

values.name: messageDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON message into a `Message`.

values.name: messagesDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of messages into a `List Message`.

values.name: paymentDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON payment into a `Payment`.

values.name: paymentsDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of payments into a `List Payment`.

values.name: sendInvoice
values.comment:
Send An Invoice

Usage:
`sendInvoice accountId token message`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoices/{INVOICEID}/messages?access_token={token}`

Response: `201 Created` if successful

values.name: updateInvoice
values.comment:
Update Existing Invoice

Usage:
`updateInvoice accountId invoice token`

sends a PUT request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoices/{INVOICEID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK`, in addition to header `LOCATION: /invoices/{INVOICEID}`

values.name: updateInvoiceCategory
values.comment:
Update Existing Category

Usage:
`updateInvoiceCategory accountId token invoiceCategory`

sends a PUT request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/invoice_item_categories/{CATEGORYID}?access_token={token}`

name: Harvest.ClientAPI

aliases.name: Client
aliases.type: { id : Int, name : String, active : Bool, currency : String, currencySymbol : String, highriseId : Maybe Int, cacheVersion : Int, details : Maybe String, defaultInvoiceTimeframe : Maybe String, lastInvoiceKind : Maybe String, createdAt : Maybe Date, updatedAt : Maybe Date }

aliases.name: Contact
aliases.type: { id : Int, clientId : Int, firstName : String, lastName : String, email : Maybe String, phoneOffice : Maybe String, phoneMobile : Maybe String, fax : Maybe String, title : Maybe String, createdAt : Maybe Date, updatedAt : Maybe Date }

values.name: clientDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON client into a `Client`.

values.name: clientsDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of clients into a `List Client`.

values.name: contactDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON contact into a `Contact`.

values.name: contactsDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON list of contacts into a `List Contact`.

values.name: createClient
values.comment:
Create A New Client

Usage:
`createClient accountId token client`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients?access_token={token}`

Response:
`201 Created`, along with header `Location /clients/{NEWCLIENTID}`

values.name: createContact
values.comment:
Create A New Client Contact

Usage:
`createContact accountId token contact`

sends a POST request to `https://YOURACCOUNT.harvestapp.com/contacts?access_token={token}`

Response: `201 Created`

Note: Only Client-ID, First-Name, and Last-Name are required.

values.name: deleteClient
values.comment:
Delete A Client

Usage:
`deleteClient accountId clientId token`

sends a DELETE request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients/{CLIENTID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK`

values.name: deleteContact
values.comment:
Delete A Client Contact

Usage:
`deleteContact accountId contactId token`

sends a DELETE request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/contacts/{CONTACTID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

values.name: getAllClients
values.comment:
Get All Clients

Usage:
`getAllClients accountId token`

sends a GET request to
`https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients?access_token={token}`

values.name: getAllContacts
values.comment:
Get All Contacts

Usage: `getAllContacts accountId token params`

sends a GET request to `https://YOURACCOUNT.harvestapp.com/contacts?access_token=token`

Response: `200 OK`

Allowed parameters:

`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2010-09-25+18%3A30`
values.type: String -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List Contact)

values.name: getAllContactsForClient
values.comment:
Get All Contacts For A Client

Usage:
`getAllContactsForClient accountId clientId token params`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients/{CLIENTID}/contacts?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK`

Allowed parameters:

`updated_since` e.g. `updated_since=2010-09-25+18%3A30`
values.type: String -> Int -> String -> Dict String String -> Request (List Contact)

values.name: getClient
values.comment:
Get A Single Client

Usage:
`getClient accountId clientId token`

sends a GET request to
`https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients/{CLIENTID}?access_token={token}`

values.name: getClientContact
values.comment:
Get A Client Contact

Usage:
`getClientContact accountId clientId token`

sends a GET request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/contacts/{CONTACTID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK` if successful

values.name: toggleClient
values.comment:
Activate Or Deactivate An Existing Client

Usage:
`toggleClient accountId clientId token`

sends a POST request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients/{CLIENTID}/toggle?access_token={token}`

Response:
`200 OK`, along with Header `Location /clients/{CLIENTID}`

values.name: updateClient
values.comment:
Update A Client

Usage:
`updateClient accountId client token`

sends a PUT request to `https://{accountId}.harvestapp.com/clients/{CLIENTID}?accessToken={token}`

Response:
`200 OK`, along with Header `Location /clients/{CLIENTID}`

values.name: updateContact
values.comment:
Update A Client Contact

Usage:
`updateContact accountId contact token`

sends a PUT request to `https://YOURACCOUNT.harvestapp.com/contacts/{CONTACTID}?access_token={token}`

Response: `200 OK`, along with header `Location /contacts/{CONTACTID}`

name: Harvest.Auth

values.name: authUrl
values.comment:
create Harvest authorization API using account name (accountId), id of your client app (clientId) and redirectUrl

Usage:
`authUrl accountId clientId redirectUrl`

values.name: checkAccessTokenAvailable
values.comment:
check if access_token is present in the url

Usage:
`checkAccessTokenAvailable urlHashToParse authenticationUrl`
